23115485.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_FIRST

249452619.english: Ahh... I knew we were being watched in Seedhollow.

107774764.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_A

107774764.en_literal: There must be a hole in any defense.

656612161.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_B
656612161.jp_real: 秘象術の使い手となれば、相当の使い手と見えるわ。
656612161.en_literal: If you're a user of forbidden magic, you'd make a pretty formidable opponent.
656612161.english: She buzzes around like a fly. Let's swat her.

114989008.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_C
114989008.jp_real: ふふふ、少しは響いたみたいね。

248866321.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_FIRST

248866321.english: So, she loves a spectacle. Then let's give her a show.

808128482.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_A
808128482.jp_real: 大丈夫。私たちなら勝てるわ。
808128482.en_literal: I'm fine. We can win this.
808128482.english: Rely on each other, and we will prevail.

1073611200.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_B

617311625.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_C
617311625.jp_real: 綺麗な花は土作りから。ね？
617311625.en_literal: Beautiful flowers grow from the soil, you know.
617311625.english: To grow a beautiful garden, you need to cull a few weeds.

281108127.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_FIRST

281108127.english: Sorry to wake you. We'll put you back to sleep soon enough.

311346999.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_FIRST

796307518.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_A

182076423.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_C

182076423.en_literal: If I can get the thorns to creep inside...
182076423.english: If I could sneak thorns into their circuitry...

1034615030.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_FIRST
1034615030.jp_real: 形あるものはいつか壊れるものよ
1034615030.en_literal: All things that have form are destined to break.
1034615030.english: May your metal husk rot and wither.

767214000.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_A

767214000.en_literal: We have to keep moving, don't we?

669815544.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_B
669815544.jp_real: 連携というのはこうするものじゃないかしら？
669815544.en_literal: Is this what you call a link?
669815544.english: Behold! The glory of true teamwork!

626398893.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_C

626398893.en_literal: I'm sorry, but we can't give in either.
626398893.english: Forgive us, Skyfarers! Don't back down!

950632204.english: I pity you. You think you can win.

530892372.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_A

30841635.en_literal: I won't lose this time, Id.
30841635.english: You have the upper hand no longer!

362719962.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_FIRST

362719962.english: Not only am I gorgeous, I'm tenacious too!

612466922.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_A
612466922.jp_real: 負けられないの。分かってちょうだい。

295895738.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_B

692244052.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_5_FIRST

692244052.en_literal: So this is... the power of the gate?
692244052.english: I... I can feel reality itself warping.

519641095.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_A
519641095.jp_real: このまま流れに乗りましょう
519641095.en_literal: Let's ride the wave like this.

940444054.english: Victory lies before us! Seize it!

788566050.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_C

788566050.english: Not bad! Though I guess we've fought it once before.

110964611.english: Are you truly a primal beast?

592533078.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_A

592533078.en_literal: I've already decided I won't hesitate anymore.
592533078.english: This is no time to hesitate!

334072511.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_B
334072511.jp_real: バラの彩りを添えてあげるわ
334072511.en_literal: I'll add some color to your roses.
334072511.english: Sink into a bed of crimson roses!

636426480.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_FIRST
636426480.jp_real: ナリが相手でも倒すことに変わりはないわ
636426480.en_literal: No matter who the opponent is, defeating them remains unchanged.
636426480.english: I'll go as many rounds as you like!

255037383.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_3_FIRST
255037383.jp_real: 文字通り、刺すような冷気ね

551458819.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_A

647770767.en_literal: Hehe, you're quite reliable when you're on our side.
647770767.english: An unexpected ally, but I'll take it.

850726929.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_A
850726929.jp_real: あははは、私たちならやれるはずよ。
850726929.english: Is there anything we can't do?

475831402.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_B
475831402.jp_real: あまりあたしたちを見くびらないことね
475831402.english: You would do well not to underestimate us.

1028180301.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_C
1028180301.jp_real: 流れというものはそうそう止められないわ
1028180301.en_literal: The flow of things... cannot be stopped so easily.

951563468.en_literal: How cruel. I won't be cowed by this much.
951563468.english: Unfortunately for you, we have nothing left to fear.

56026661.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_A

283552051.english: We will stop you, no matter what!

786907364.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_C

786907364.en_literal: I won't go down that easily!
786907364.english: I've had enough of your evil machinations!

997792557.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_FIRST

997792557.en_literal: I'm sorry, but I can't overlook this.
997792557.english: Pardon us, we're only trying to save the world here.

53397549.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_A

53397549.english: I'll pierce through her with all that I am!

927800836.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_B
927800836.jp_real: 大丈夫。あともう一押しだわ。
927800836.en_literal: I'm fine. Just one more push!

23131654.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_C

23131654.english: Let us finish this! For the skies!

589316028.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_FIRST

589316028.en_literal: This is... the power of our bond!

793473621.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_A
793473621.jp_real: 取り戻せるわ。きっとね。
793473621.en_literal: I can get it back. I'm sure of it.
793473621.english: You're going to come home to us, Id!

56764822.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_B

56764822.english: A god stands before us, but we won't back down!

970318158.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_C

970318158.en_literal: I have to deliver our voices!
970318158.english: Id, I know you can hear us!

749662128.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_FIRST
